allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'docker|Antigravity|antigravity|Code|vmmem|wsl' } | Select-Object Name, Id, @{n='RAM_MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Sort-Object RAM_MB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{n='Used_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='Free_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}; Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object @{n='TotalRAM_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1\)}}, @{n='FreeRAM_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\)}})

PowerShell($r="$env:APPDATA\\Antigravity"; Get-ChildItem $r -Directory -Force | ForEach-Object { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\); [PSCustomObject]@{Dir=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s.Sum/1MB,1\); Files=$s.Count} } | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r="$env:USERPROFILE\\.antigravity"; Get-ChildItem $r -Directory -Force | ForEach-Object { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\); [PSCustomObject]@{Dir=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s.Sum/1MB,1\); Files=$s.Count} } | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r="$env:APPDATA\\Antigravity\\User"; Get-ChildItem $r -Force | ForEach-Object { if\($_.PSIsContainer\){$s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\); [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s.Sum/1MB,2\); Files=$s.Count}} else {[PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\); Files=1}} } | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ws="$env:APPDATA\\Antigravity\\User\\workspaceStorage"; if\(Test-Path $ws\){ Get-ChildItem $ws -Directory | ForEach-Object { $j=Join-Path $_.FullName 'workspace.json'; $folder=''; if\(Test-Path $j\){ $folder=\(Get-Content $j -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).folder }; $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\); [PSCustomObject]@{Id=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s.Sum/1MB,2\); Folder=$folder} } | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap } else { 'no workspaceStorage' })

PowerShell($l="$env:APPDATA\\Antigravity\\logs"; Get-ChildItem $l -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 2 | ForEach-Object { "=== $\($_.Name\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N0} KB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1KB\), $_.FullName.Replace\($l,''\) } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Antigravity\\Crashpad" -Recurse -File -Force | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Deadstro/AppData/Roaming/Antigravity/logs/20260722T144832" && echo "===== main.log =====" && cat main.log && echo "" && echo "===== renderer.log =====" && cat window1/renderer.log && echo "" && echo "===== ls-main.log =====" && cat ls-main.log)

PowerShell($s="$env:USERPROFILE\\.antigravity\\skills"; Get-ChildItem $s -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Name; "---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.antigravity" -Force | Select-Object Name, Mode)
